site.title: Useful Tools
site.tagline: Free tools that run right in your browser. Your files never leave your device.

home.heading: Tools
home.subheading: Pick a tool and use it instantly.

qr.title: QR Code Generator
qr.description: Turn any link or text into a QR code and save it as PNG or SVG.
qr.emptyHint: Enter a URL or text above to see your QR code.
qr.ecHint: Higher levels survive more damage but make a denser code.
qr.lowContrast: Foreground/background contrast is too low — the code may not scan.
qr.invertedColors: Light foreground on a dark background may fail on some scanners.
qr.renderFailed: Could not generate the QR code. Please check your input.
qr.copyFailed: Copy isn’t supported in this browser. Use download instead.
qr.tooLong: Text is too long to fit in a QR code. Shorten it or lower the error-correction level.
qr.metaTitle: Free QR Code Generator — No Sign-Up, PNG & SVG
qr.metaDescription: Turn any URL or text into a QR code and download it as PNG or SVG. Free, no sign-up, generated right in your browser — nothing you type is sent to a server. Adjust error correction, size, and colors.
howTo: Enter the URL or text you want to turn into a QR code.
Adjust the error-correction level, size, margin, or colors if you like.
Download it as a PNG or SVG, or copy the image.
features: Free with no sign-up — the codes you create never expire.
Save as PNG or vector SVG (SVG is best for print).
Everything runs in your browser — nothing you type is sent to a server.

faq.q: Do I need an account?
faq.a: No. You can create and download QR codes right away, with no sign-up or login.

faq.q: Do the QR codes expire?
faq.a: No. These are static QR codes — the data lives inside the image itself, so they keep working forever.

faq.q: Can I download an SVG?
faq.a: Yes. Both PNG and SVG are free to download. For print, SVG is recommended because it scales to any size without losing quality.

faq.q: Is my data sent to a server?
faq.a: No. The QR code is generated in your browser, and the text or URL you enter is never sent to a server.

faq.q: Can I use it for print?
faq.a: Yes. Download an SVG so it stays sharp at any size. For printing, aim for at least 2×2 cm and 300 DPI.

wifi-qr-code.title: WiFi QR Code Generator
wifi-qr-code.description: Create a QR code that connects people to your WiFi network when scanned — no typing the password.
wifi-qr-code.metaTitle: Free WiFi QR Code Generator — Instant Network Connect
wifi-qr-code.metaDescription: Make a free WiFi QR code so guests join your network by scanning — no password typing. Enter your SSID and password; the code is generated in your browser and never sent to a server. Download PNG or SVG.
wifi-qr-code.emptyHint: Enter your network name to see the WiFi QR code.
wifi-qr-code.ecHint: Higher levels survive more damage but make a denser code.
wifi-qr-code.lowContrast: Foreground/background contrast is too low — the code may not scan.
wifi-qr-code.invertedColors: Light foreground on a dark background may fail on some scanners.
wifi-qr-code.renderFailed: Could not generate the QR code. Please check your input.
wifi-qr-code.tooLong: The details are too long to fit in a QR code. Shorten them or lower the error-correction level.
wifi-qr-code.copyFailed: Copy isn’t supported in this browser. Use download instead.
howTo: Enter your WiFi network name (SSID) and password.
Pick the encryption type — WPA works for almost all modern routers.
Download the code and print or display it. People scan it to connect.
features: People connect by scanning — no need to read out or type the password.
Free with no sign-up, and the code never expires.
Your network name and password stay in your browser and are never sent to a server.

faq.q: How does a WiFi QR code work?
faq.a: The code holds your network name, password, and encryption type. Most phone cameras read it and offer to join the network automatically.

faq.q: Is my WiFi password safe?
faq.a: Yes. The code is generated entirely in your browser — your SSID and password are never uploaded to a server.

faq.q: Which encryption should I choose?
faq.a: Choose WPA for almost all modern routers (it covers WPA, WPA2, and WPA3). Use WEP only for old networks, or None for open networks.

faq.q: Does it work on iPhone and Android?
faq.a: Yes. iOS 11+ and modern Android read WiFi QR codes with the built-in camera app.

faq.q: Can I print it?
faq.a: Yes. Download the SVG for a sharp print at any size — handy for a card on the table or a poster on the wall.

vcard-qr-code.title: vCard QR Code Generator
vcard-qr-code.description: Create a QR code that saves your contact details to a phone when scanned.
vcard-qr-code.metaTitle: Free vCard QR Code Generator — Contact Card QR
vcard-qr-code.metaDescription: Make a free vCard QR code that saves your name, phone, email, and more to a phone's contacts when scanned. Generated in your browser and never sent to a server. Download PNG or SVG.
vcard-qr-code.emptyHint: Enter a name or phone to see the contact QR code.
vcard-qr-code.ecHint: Higher levels survive more damage but make a denser code.
vcard-qr-code.lowContrast: Foreground/background contrast is too low — the code may not scan.
vcard-qr-code.invertedColors: Light foreground on a dark background may fail on some scanners.
vcard-qr-code.renderFailed: Could not generate the QR code. Please check your input.
vcard-qr-code.tooLong: The details are too long to fit in a QR code. Shorten them or lower the error-correction level.
vcard-qr-code.copyFailed: Copy isn’t supported in this browser. Use download instead.
howTo: Fill in the contact details you want to share.
Adjust the size or colors if you like.
Download the code. Scanning it adds the contact to a phone.
features: Scanning saves your details straight to a phone's contacts.
Free with no sign-up, and the code never expires.
Your contact details stay in your browser and are never sent to a server.

faq.q: What is a vCard QR code?
faq.a: It's a QR code containing contact details in the vCard format. Scanning it lets a phone save the contact in one tap.

faq.q: Is my information private?
faq.a: Yes. The code is generated in your browser — nothing you enter is sent to a server.

faq.q: Which fields should I include?
faq.a: At least a name and one way to reach you (phone or email). Organization, job title, and website are optional.

faq.q: Does it work on all phones?
faq.a: Yes. iPhone and Android read vCard QR codes with the built-in camera and offer to create a contact.

faq.q: Can I put it on a business card?
faq.a: Yes. Download the SVG so it stays sharp at print size, then add it to your card or email signature.

email-qr-code.title: Email QR Code Generator
email-qr-code.description: Create a QR code that opens a new email — pre-filled with the address, subject, and message.
email-qr-code.metaTitle: Free Email QR Code Generator — mailto QR
email-qr-code.metaDescription: Create a free email QR code that opens a pre-addressed email when scanned, with an optional subject and message. Generated in your browser and never sent to a server. Download PNG or SVG.
email-qr-code.emptyHint: Enter a recipient email to see the QR code.
email-qr-code.ecHint: Higher levels survive more damage but make a denser code.
email-qr-code.lowContrast: Foreground/background contrast is too low — the code may not scan.
email-qr-code.invertedColors: Light foreground on a dark background may fail on some scanners.
email-qr-code.renderFailed: Could not generate the QR code. Please check your input.
email-qr-code.tooLong: The details are too long to fit in a QR code. Shorten them or lower the error-correction level.
email-qr-code.copyFailed: Copy isn’t supported in this browser. Use download instead.
howTo: Enter the recipient email address.
Add an optional subject and message.
Download the QR code. Scanning it opens a ready-to-send email.
features: Scanning opens a new email pre-filled with your address, subject, and message.
Free with no sign-up, and the code never expires.
Everything is generated in your browser — nothing is sent to a server.

faq.q: How does an email QR code work?
faq.a: It uses a mailto link. When scanned, the phone opens its email app with your address — and any subject or message — already filled in.

faq.q: Does it send the email automatically?
faq.a: No. It only opens a ready-to-send draft; the person taps send themselves.

faq.q: Can I add a subject and message?
faq.a: Yes. Both are optional and are pre-filled in the email when someone scans the code.

faq.q: Is it free?
faq.a: Yes — free, with no sign-up, and the code never expires.

faq.q: Can I download an SVG?
faq.a: Yes. Both PNG and SVG are free to download; SVG is best for print.

sms-qr-code.title: SMS QR Code Generator
sms-qr-code.description: Create a QR code that opens a text message — pre-filled with the number and message.
sms-qr-code.metaTitle: Free SMS QR Code Generator — Text Message QR
sms-qr-code.metaDescription: Create a free SMS QR code that opens a pre-filled text message when scanned. Enter a phone number and message; generated in your browser and never sent to a server. Download PNG or SVG.
sms-qr-code.emptyHint: Enter a phone number to see the SMS QR code.
sms-qr-code.ecHint: Higher levels survive more damage but make a denser code.
sms-qr-code.lowContrast: Foreground/background contrast is too low — the code may not scan.
sms-qr-code.invertedColors: Light foreground on a dark background may fail on some scanners.
sms-qr-code.renderFailed: Could not generate the QR code. Please check your input.
sms-qr-code.tooLong: The details are too long to fit in a QR code. Shorten them or lower the error-correction level.
sms-qr-code.copyFailed: Copy isn’t supported in this browser. Use download instead.
howTo: Enter the phone number to text.
Add the message you want pre-filled.
Download the QR code. Scanning it opens a ready-to-send text.
features: Scanning opens a text message pre-filled with the number and message.
Free with no sign-up, and the code never expires.
Generated in your browser — nothing is sent to a server.

faq.q: How does an SMS QR code work?
faq.a: It uses the SMSTO format. When scanned, the phone opens its messaging app with the number and message already filled in.

faq.q: Do I need a message?
faq.a: No. The message is optional — with just a number, scanning opens a blank text to that number.

faq.q: Does it send automatically?
faq.a: No. It opens a ready-to-send draft; the person taps send.

faq.q: Is it free?
faq.a: Yes — free, with no sign-up, and the code never expires.

faq.q: Which phones support it?
faq.a: Most modern iPhones and Android phones read SMS QR codes with the built-in camera.

phone-qr-code.title: Phone Number QR Code Generator
phone-qr-code.description: Create a QR code that starts a phone call when scanned.
phone-qr-code.metaTitle: Free Phone Number QR Code Generator — Call QR
phone-qr-code.metaDescription: Create a free phone number QR code that starts a call when scanned. Enter a number; generated in your browser and never sent to a server. Download PNG or SVG.
phone-qr-code.emptyHint: Enter a phone number to see the QR code.
phone-qr-code.ecHint: Higher levels survive more damage but make a denser code.
phone-qr-code.lowContrast: Foreground/background contrast is too low — the code may not scan.
phone-qr-code.invertedColors: Light foreground on a dark background may fail on some scanners.
phone-qr-code.renderFailed: Could not generate the QR code. Please check your input.
phone-qr-code.tooLong: The details are too long to fit in a QR code. Shorten them or lower the error-correction level.
phone-qr-code.copyFailed: Copy isn’t supported in this browser. Use download instead.
howTo: Enter the phone number, ideally with the country code.
Adjust the size or colors if you like.
Download the QR code. Scanning it offers to call the number.
features: Scanning offers to dial your number in one tap.
Free with no sign-up, and the code never expires.
Generated in your browser — nothing is sent to a server.

faq.q: How does a phone QR code work?
faq.a: It uses a tel link. When scanned, the phone offers to call the number — no typing required.

faq.q: Should I include the country code?
faq.a: Yes, for reliability. Start with + and the country code so it works internationally.

faq.q: Does it call automatically?
faq.a: No. It opens the dialer with the number ready; the person taps call.

faq.q: Is it free?
faq.a: Yes — free, with no sign-up, and the code never expires.

faq.q: Can I use it in print?
faq.a: Yes. Download the SVG so it stays sharp on posters, flyers, or signs.

whatsapp-qr-code.title: WhatsApp QR Code Generator
whatsapp-qr-code.description: Create a QR code that opens a WhatsApp chat — with an optional pre-filled message.
whatsapp-qr-code.metaTitle: Free WhatsApp QR Code Generator — Chat QR
whatsapp-qr-code.metaDescription: Create a free WhatsApp QR code that opens a chat with your number when scanned, with an optional pre-filled message. Generated in your browser and never sent to a server. Download PNG or SVG.
whatsapp-qr-code.emptyHint: Enter a phone number to see the WhatsApp QR code.
whatsapp-qr-code.ecHint: Higher levels survive more damage but make a denser code.
whatsapp-qr-code.lowContrast: Foreground/background contrast is too low — the code may not scan.
whatsapp-qr-code.invertedColors: Light foreground on a dark background may fail on some scanners.

whatsapp-qr-code.copyFailed: Copy isn’t supported in this browser. Use download instead.

Add an optional message to pre-fill.
Download the QR code. Scanning it opens a WhatsApp chat with you.
features: Scanning opens a WhatsApp chat with your number, ready to message.
Free with no sign-up, and the code never expires.
Generated in your browser — nothing is sent to a server.

faq.q: How does a WhatsApp QR code work?
faq.a: It uses a wa.me link. When scanned, WhatsApp opens a chat with your number and any pre-filled message.

faq.q: Do I need the country code?
faq.a: Yes. Enter the full number with country code (for example +1…) so WhatsApp can find it.

faq.q: Is this the official WhatsApp code?
faq.a: It is a standard wa.me link — exactly what WhatsApp uses for click-to-chat.

faq.q: Is it free?
faq.a: Yes — free, with no sign-up, and the code never expires.

faq.q: Can I use it in print?
faq.a: Yes. Download the SVG for a sharp print on flyers, menus, or shop windows.

location-qr-code.title: Location QR Code Generator
location-qr-code.description: Create a QR code that opens a map location when scanned.
location-qr-code.metaTitle: Free Location QR Code Generator — Map & GPS QR
location-qr-code.metaDescription: Create a free location QR code that opens a map at your coordinates when scanned. Enter latitude and longitude; generated in your browser and never sent to a server. Download PNG or SVG.
location-qr-code.emptyHint: Enter latitude and longitude to see the location QR code.
location-qr-code.ecHint: Higher levels survive more damage but make a denser code.
location-qr-code.lowContrast: Foreground/background contrast is too low — the code may not scan.
location-qr-code.invertedColors: Light foreground on a dark background may fail on some scanners.
location-qr-code.renderFailed: Could not generate the QR code. Please check your input.
location-qr-code.tooLong: The details are too long to fit in a QR code. Shorten them or lower the error-correction level.
location-qr-code.copyFailed: Copy isn’t supported in this browser. Use download instead.

Add an optional place name.
Download the QR code. Scanning it opens the location in a map app.

Free with no sign-up, and the code never expires.
Generated in your browser — nothing is sent to a server.

faq.q: How does a location QR code work?
faq.a: It uses a geo URI with latitude and longitude. When scanned, the phone opens the point in its default map app.

faq.q: Where do I find latitude and longitude?
faq.a: In Google Maps, right-click a spot (or long-press on mobile) to copy its coordinates.

faq.q: Does it work on iPhone and Android?
faq.a: Yes. Both open geo coordinates in their map app when scanning.

faq.q: Is it free?
faq.a: Yes — free, with no sign-up, and the code never expires.

faq.q: Can I use it in print?
faq.a: Yes. Download the SVG for a sharp print on signs, invitations, or store windows.

event-qr-code.title: Event QR Code Generator
event-qr-code.description: Create a QR code that adds an event to a calendar when scanned.
event-qr-code.metaTitle: Free Event QR Code Generator — Calendar QR
event-qr-code.metaDescription: Create a free calendar event QR code that adds an event to a phone’s calendar when scanned. Enter the title, time, and location; generated in your browser and never sent to a server. Download PNG or SVG.
event-qr-code.emptyHint: Enter an event title or start time to see the QR code.
event-qr-code.ecHint: Higher levels survive more damage but make a denser code.
event-qr-code.lowContrast: Foreground/background contrast is too low — the code may not scan.
event-qr-code.invertedColors: Light foreground on a dark background may fail on some scanners.
event-qr-code.renderFailed: Could not generate the QR code. Please check your input.
event-qr-code.tooLong: The details are too long to fit in a QR code. Shorten them or lower the error-correction level.
event-qr-code.copyFailed: Copy isn’t supported in this browser. Use download instead.
howTo: Enter the event title and start time.
Add the end time, location, and description if you like.
Download the QR code. Scanning it offers to add the event to a calendar.
features: Scanning offers to add the event straight to a phone’s calendar.
Free with no sign-up, and the code never expires.
Generated in your browser — nothing is sent to a server.

faq.q: How does an event QR code work?
faq.a: It contains the event in the iCalendar (VEVENT) format. When scanned, the phone offers to add it to the calendar.

faq.q: Which time zone does it use?
faq.a: Times are saved as entered (local floating time), so they appear the same in whichever calendar opens them.

faq.q: Does it work on iPhone and Android?
faq.a: Yes. Both read event QR codes and offer to create a calendar entry.

faq.q: Is it free?
faq.a: Yes — free, with no sign-up, and the code never expires.

faq.q: Can I use it on invitations?
faq.a: Yes. Download the SVG for a sharp print on invitations, posters, or tickets.
